name: CAPSTONE COMPANIES, INC.
business: The company has no revenue-generating business and no products in active commercialization as of the latter half of fiscal year 2025. It is currently evaluating new business opportunities, including a potential transaction with eBliss Global, Inc. in the e-mobility sector.

exposures.sentence: On March 3, 2026, the Company entered into a promissory note with eBliss Global, Inc. (eBliss Note), a private early-stage Delaware corporation engaged in the developing and production of e-mobility solutions (including and initially making e-bikes as transportation vehicles at a Utica, New York factory).
